## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [15 articles posted, 5-10 more to go, with 30-40 in the pipeline; focus on AI role-play practice cluster](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Impressions are prominent, clicks expected to follow as content ramps up](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [New programmatic approach for role-play content structure agreed upon](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Sean to create custom videos for role-play pages to enhance conversion and sales process](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [First-party stat shared: 20-point average lift (C to A grade) in role-play performance](https://fathom.video/share/bLToPnPpyCcV7dNQWxb6B_W3--zxRzzq?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Reporting
